name: Fan-Yi (Jenny) Ou
tagline: I turn messy, manual processes into products that ship — and prove it with numbers.
about: Hello — I'm Jenny Ou, originally from Taiwan. I hold a BSc (Eng) in Creative Computing from Queen Mary University of London and I'm heading into an MSc in Business Information Technology Management at the University of Amsterdam.

I work at the intersection of technology, business and design. Most recently I designed and built a three-layer AI-assisted document production system at GOSTUDY as sole designer and builder, and architected a LINE self-service support platform serving a 500+ student-per-year programme at Jobwise.
Whether it's an AI document pipeline, a CRM rollout or a full-stack matching platform, my approach is the same: diagnose the real problem, design the system, ship it, and measure the impact.

stats.label: projected yearly cost reduction — AI document engine
students per year served by self-service platform
sales workflow efficiency gain from CRM rollout
